this-week-outdoors.title: This Week Outdoors
this-week-outdoors.purpose: One-page invitation for the week — what to learn indoors, what to test outside on the weekend.
this-week-outdoors.visualLayout: wce-week-banner — headline, four condition blocks, weekday/weekend split
this-week-outdoors.photography: One wide hero frame — current conditions in county
this-week-outdoors.mapsDiagrams: Optional county locator; weather map inset
this-week-outdoors.subscriptionValue: Free: current week. Subscriber: archive + adjacent counties

regional-field-notes.title: Regional Field Notes
regional-field-notes.purpose: Short dispatches — trail, weather, wildlife, phenology — like a ranger bulletin.
regional-field-notes.photography: Optional small evidence thumbnail per note
regional-field-notes.mapsDiagrams: Watershed or trail map when place-specific
regional-field-notes.citizenScience: Rare; trail condition or phenology opt-in
regional-field-notes.subscriptionValue: Free: 3 notes/week. Subscriber: full archive + alerts

seasonal-watch.title: Seasonal Watch
seasonal-watch.purpose: Phenology calendar — what is emerging, peaking, fading in the county.
seasonal-watch.cadence: Updated weekly; peaks flagged daily in season
seasonal-watch.visualLayout: wce-seasonal-grid — species/event cards with status chip
seasonal-watch.outdoorChallenge: Find one watch-list species this weekend
seasonal-watch.subscriptionValue: Free: top 5 watches. Subscriber: full calendar + email digest

weekend-field-investigation.title: Weekend Field Investigation
weekend-field-investigation.purpose: Capstone outdoor lab — 60–120 minutes, structured steps, Saturday/Sunday.
weekend-field-investigation.subscriptionValue: Free: one investigation. Subscriber: printable PDF + educator rubric

research-brief.title: Research Brief
research-brief.purpose: Plain-language science — local application paragraph required.
research-brief.citizenScience: If study used community data — transparent link
research-brief.subscriptionValue: Free: summary. Subscriber: full brief archive + citations

featured-video.title: Featured Video
featured-video.purpose: Short demonstration — show phenomenon before explanation; assign outdoor follow-up.
featured-video.visualLayout: ws-video-feature — click to play, never autoplay
featured-video.mapsDiagrams: When habitat or navigation context matters
featured-video.subscriptionValue: Free: current video. Subscriber: full archive

photo-essay.title: Photo Essay
photo-essay.purpose: 5–8 evidence frames telling one place-and-season story.
photo-essay.subscriptionValue: Free: one essay/month. Subscriber: gallery archive

species-spotlight.title: Species Spotlight
species-spotlight.purpose: One organism — ID, ecology, ethics, look-alikes — gateway to field guide.
species-spotlight.subscriptionValue: Free: spotlight. Subscriber: full species library

teachers-notebook.title: Teacher's Notebook
teachers-notebook.purpose: Field-tested lab — objectives, safety, 50%+ outdoor time.
teachers-notebook.subscriptionValue: Free: one lab. Educator tier: rubrics + standards map

conservation-update.title: Conservation Update
conservation-update.purpose: Stewardship story — real place, honest hope, local action.
conservation-update.outdoorChallenge: Visit public viewpoint; note one sign
